name: Strike
formula: Physical QTE + ATK vs DEF, then final damage rolls between 75% and 125%.
effects: Benefits from the next Focus damage boost.
details: Strike is the baseline physical attack. It compares your attack value and QTE performance against the enemy's defense.
A strong QTE lead can push through a tougher defense, while a poor QTE can be guarded or evaded.
Strike is reliable when you want to build SP without spending MP.
